hook.text: If you are not sure your employer will support you with endometriosis, watch this
hook.target_audience_raw: people with endometriosis concerned about employer support

main_claim.text: Many companies, through HR, will recognise your symptoms and adapt your work to accommodate them.

supporting_explanation.summary: The video states that if you have an illness and go through HR, many companies will recognise symptoms and adapt work accordingly.

funnel_rationale: Addresses a practical workplace challenge for those already aware of endometriosis, moving beyond basic awareness to actionable advice.
